requirement_topic.en: OCPP, Remote Operation, EMC, and Power Quality

summary.en: Fiji has a nascent EV charging market, so OCPP may be a tender, charge-point-operator, fleet, or donor-project requirement rather than a confirmed universal national mandate. Networked chargers should nevertheless support an agreed OCPP profile for remote monitoring, user authorization, payment or fleet reporting, fault handling, firmware updates, and load management. EMC and power quality should be evidenced under IEC 61000 practice, especially for island grids, weak feeders, generator-backed sites, and locations exposed to lightning and tropical storms.
summary.zh: 斐济电动汽车充电市场仍处于早期阶段，因此OCPP可能是招标、充电点运营商、车队或援助项目要求，而非已确认的全国统一强制要求。尽管如此，联网充电桩仍应支持约定的OCPP配置，用于远程监控、用户授权、支付或车队报表、故障处理、固件更新和负载管理。EMC和电能质量应依据IEC 61000实践提供证据，尤其适用于岛国电网、弱馈线、备用发电站点以及受雷电和热带风暴影响的地点。
summary.zht: 斐濟電動汽車充電市場仍處於早期階段，因此OCPP可能是招標、充電點運營商、車隊或援助項目要求，而非已確認的全國統一強制要求。儘管如此，聯網充電樁仍應支持約定的OCPP配置，用於遠程監控、用戶授權、支付或車隊報表、故障處理、固件更新和負載管理。EMC和電能質量應依據IEC 61000實踐提供證據，尤其適用於島國電網、弱饋線、備用發電站點以及受雷電和熱帶風暴影響的地點。

standards_or_laws: OCPP - Open Charge Point Protocol for networked chargers where specified
IEC 61000 series - EMC immunity, emissions, harmonics, flicker, and surge
IEC 61851-21-2 - EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems
EFL project power-quality and connection review where applicable

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. That vehicle-side protocol is not a substitute for OCPP back-office integration and is not compatible with CCS2 deployments using IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication where required. China EMC files may be based on GB/T tests and must be mapped to the IEC 61000 evidence expected by Fiji projects.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常使用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信连接非车载充电机和车辆BMS。该车端协议不能替代OCPP后台集成，也不兼容要求IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信的CCS2部署。中国EMC文件可能基于GB/T测试，须映射到斐济项目预期的IEC 61000证据。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常使用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊連接非車載充電機和車輛BMS。該車端協議不能替代OCPP後台集成，也不兼容要求IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊的CCS2部署。中國EMC文件可能基於GB/T測試，須映射到斐濟項目預期的IEC 61000證據。

standards_or_laws: China GB/T EMC evidence where available

gap.en: Exporters should confirm the required OCPP version, SIM or Ethernet connectivity, offline mode, remote firmware update controls, cybersecurity settings, payment or fleet integration, and local data needs. For EMC, provide IEC 61000 emissions and immunity reports, surge protection design, harmonic data, and commissioning measurements for the specific EFL feeder or site. GB/T 27930 alone does not make a charger network-ready in Fiji.
gap.zh: 出口商应确认所需OCPP版本、SIM或以太网连接、离线模式、远程固件更新控制、网络安全设置、支付或车队集成以及本地数据需求。EMC方面，应提供IEC 61000发射和抗扰度报告、浪涌保护设计、谐波数据，以及具体EFL馈线或站点的调试测量。仅有GB/T 27930不能使充电桩满足斐济联网运营要求。
gap.zht: 出口商應確認所需OCPP版本、SIM或乙太網連接、離線模式、遠程固件更新控制、網絡安全設置、支付或車隊集成以及本地數據需求。EMC方面，應提供IEC 61000發射和抗擾度報告、浪湧保護設計、諧波數據，以及具體EFL饋線或站點的調試測量。僅有GB/T 27930不能使充電樁滿足斐濟聯網運營要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional - OCPP is project or operator mandatory where specified; EMC and power-quality evidence are expected for grid-connected charger acceptance and electrical safety review
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is a China domestic DC vehicle-communication protocol and is not an OCPP or IEC 61000 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Fiji, OCPP should be treated as a project or operator requirement unless confirmed as a national mandate, but networked chargers still need validated back-office integration and IEC 61000 EMC / power-quality evidence for island-grid conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在斐济，除非确认其为全国强制要求，否则OCPP应视为项目或运营商要求；但联网充电桩仍需针对岛国电网条件验证后台集成及IEC 61000 EMC / 电能质量证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在斐濟，除非確認其為全國強制要求，否則OCPP應視為項目或運營商要求；但聯網充電樁仍需針對島國電網條件驗證後台集成及IEC 61000 EMC / 電能質量證據。
